response.justification: The candidate has nearly two decades of hands-on software development across web, mobile, and high-throughput backend systems, meeting the raw years-of-experience bar, but the trajectory is that of a strong senior individual contributor rather than a director-level principal engineer. There is no evidence of organization-level technical strategy, recognized AI thought leadership, or shipped AI products beyond recent MCP tooling contributions, and no advanced AI-related degree — a substantial gap against this role's core focus on AI strategy and executive-level influence.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency systems
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Founder experience and public speaking/workshops show initiative and communication skills
concerns: No principal- or director-level scope; career has stayed at senior/staff IC on product teams
No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise at the level the role demands
Limited cloud-strategy and executive advisory experience with strategic customers or partners
